overview: A full-featured light-mode website for SK PHOTOSTUDIO, a photo studio in Khapri, Maharashtra. Showcases all services (photo albums, framing, printing, visa/passport photos), a portfolio gallery, appointment booking, customer testimonials, and full contact information with WhatsApp integration.
features: Interactive 3D hero section with photography-themed visuals
Portfolio gallery with 9 sample work cards
Detailed service cards for all 4 services
Built-in appointment booking form with backend submission
Book Now button linked to WhatsApp
Customer testimonials carousel with star ratings
Floating social sidebar with WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook
AI chatbot widget with photo studio quick-replies
Full contact section with map address, phone, and hours
Light mode design with warm amber/gold accents
